title: S + V + now that + S + V

formulas.formula: Now that + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 既然……（現在情況已成立），……；強調現在已成立的原因或背景

formulas.formula: Now that + S + V, S + will/can/should + V
formulas.zh: 既然……（現在情況已成立），……就能/應該……

explanation: Now that 為從屬連詞，引導原因狀語從句，表達「既然現在已成立的事實或情況」。相比 since 和 because，now that 更強調當下已成立的新情況，帶有「既然如此」的立即反應語氣。從句中的動詞通常用過去完成式或現在完成式，表示該情況已發生或已確立。主句則可用各種時態。此句型常見於正式或中等嚴肅的語境。

examples.eng: Now that you have graduated, you can finally pursue your dream job.
examples.chi: 既然你已經畢業了，你終於可以追求你理想的工作。

examples.eng: Now that the project is completed, we should celebrate our team's hard work.
examples.chi: 既然專案已完成，我們應該慶祝團隊的辛勞。

examples.eng: Now that climate change is a serious global issue, governments must take immediate action.
examples.chi: 既然氣候變遷已成為嚴重的全球問題，政府必須立即採取行動。

examples.eng: Now that you understand the rules, you should follow them without hesitation.
examples.chi: 既然你現在理解了規則，你應該毫不猶豫地遵守它們。

extension.tip: Now that 與 since/because 的區別在於強調時間點。Now that 表「既然現狀如此」，暗示新情況已發生；since 則較中立的原因說明；because 則表邏輯因果。判斷時留意從句是否強調「已成立」的新現狀，而非單純的理由。

examples.test: Now that we have the funding, we can start the research project.
examples.result: → 正確。強調資金已到位這個新現狀，由此引出可以開始的結論

examples.test: Now that it is raining, let's stay home instead.
examples.result: → 正確。強調當下已下雨的現狀，引出立即調整的決定

examples.test: Now that he was tired, he went to bed early.
examples.result: → 不妥。過去式不適合 now that；應改為 Since he was tired 或 Because he was tired

extension.note: Now that 用於強調現在已成立的新情況，從句優先用現在完成式或現在簡單式。

parts: your degree, you should start looking for a job.
exercises.sentence: Now that you have completed your degree, you should start looking for a job.
exercises.translation: 既然你已完成學位，你應該開始找工作。

parts: , both parties can proceed with confidence.
exercises.sentence: Now that the contract has been signed, both parties can proceed with confidence.
exercises.translation: 既然合約已簽署，雙方可以有信心地推進。

parts: you understand the importance of health, you must adopt better lifestyle habits.
exercises.sentence: Now that you understand the importance of health, you must adopt better lifestyle habits.
exercises.translation: 既然你現在理解健康的重要性，你必須養成更好的生活習慣。

parts: , companies can reduce production costs significantly.
blanks: has been developed / has become available
exercises.sentence: Now that the technology has been developed, companies can reduce production costs significantly.
exercises.translation: 既然技術已經研發出來，公司可以大幅降低生產成本。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適合的連詞和動詞時態組合
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you have finished your homework, you can go out to play with your friends.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『Now that』是從屬連詞，引導原因狀語從句，表示「既然現在已完成的事實」，強調當下已成立的情況。B 項『Because of』後需接名詞，不能接完成式句子。C 項『Although』表「雖然」，邏輯不符。D 項『Unless』表「除非」，語義相反。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型結構和主句動詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: Now that the company has received the investment, it _______ expand its business operations next year.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『Now that』從句用完成式表示已確立的事實，主句應用未來式『will be able to』表示隨之而來的結果。B 項現在完成式不符合「次年擴展」的未來時間。C 項『would』帶有虛擬或推測意味，不適合確定的推論。D 項『is being able to』用法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷從句時態和連詞搭配的正確性
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the government has implemented the new environmental policy, citizens _______ take more responsibility for protecting nature.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。『Now that』強調「既然政策已推行這個新情況」，搭配『should』表示應有的責任反應，更符合「立即反應新情況」的語氣。A 項『Since』較中立，不如『Now that』強調新情況的即時感。C 項『Although』表讓步，邏輯錯誤。D 項『Because』後不應接完成式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在複雜句式中正確應用 now that 句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: Now that we have secured funding for the research project, _______ we should focus on recruiting experienced scientists and establishing a proper timeline for each phase of the study.

options.text: we cannot ignore the fact that

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『Now that』引導已確立的新情況（獲得資金），主句應表達基於此情況的必要行動。『it is crucial that』（關鍵是）最能表達隨之而來的重要結果。B 項『no doubt』過於肯定且冗餘。C 項『uncertain』與『Now that』的確定性衝突。D 項『cannot ignore』用法生硬，不如 A 項自然流暢。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然你已經畢業了，你應該為自己的未來做計畫。
translation_exercises.answer: Now that you have graduated, you should make a plan for your future.
key_points: Now that + 現在完成式（have graduated）
hints: 提示1：從句用現在完成式表示已完成的事實，主句用 should 表示建議
提示2：注意不要寫成 Now that you graduated（過去簡單式在此不適當）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然他們已經完成了報告，他們可以專注於下一個項目。
translation_exercises.answer: Now that they have completed the report, they can focus on the next project.
key_points: Now that + 現在完成式（have completed）
主句用 can + V 表能力/可能性
hints: 提示1：『既然...已經』強調新情況已成立，從句需用完成式
提示2：主句的 can 不能改為 could，因為表示現在的可能性，不是假設過去

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然班費已經收齊了，我們就可以開始籌劃班級旅遊，同學們都會很開心。
translation_exercises.answer: Now that the class fees have been collected, we can start planning the class trip, and all classmates will be very happy.
key_points: Now that + 現在完成被動式（have been collected）
並列句結構（and + 主句延伸）
hints: 提示1：被動語態 have been collected 表示費用已被收齊這一既成事實
提示2：『既然』帶有立即反應感，所以主句用 can/will，不應用 could/would

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然學校已經實施新的課程改革，學生應該適應不同的教學方式，而教師也需要更新他們的教學策略。
translation_exercises.answer: Now that the school has implemented the new curriculum reform, students should adapt to different teaching methods, and teachers also need to update their teaching strategies.
key_points: Now that + 現在完成式（has implemented）
主句用 should + V 和 need to + V 的並列結構
adapt to / update 的目標賓語搭配
hints: 提示1：複雜句中，Now that 從句引導整個原因背景，可連接兩個或多個主句結果
提示2：注意動詞時態一致性：from句已完成（have implemented），主句表現在或將來的應對（should/need）
